text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "OntoProtein: Protein Pretraining With Gene Ontology Embedding" is real and was published at ICLR 2022, but its actual authors are Ningyu Zhang, Zhen Bi, Xiaozhuan Liang, Siyuan Cheng, Haosen Hong, Shumin Deng, Qiang Zhang, Jiazhang Lian, and Huajun Chen — none of whom match the five cited authors (Yue Zhang, Xiang Li, Yifan Zhao, Shuang Wang, Liang Gao). The cited reference grafts a real paper title onto a completely fabricated author list, which is a hallucinated reference.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2201.11147
